project_name: Digital Gram Property & Tax Management System – Maharashtra

core_principles: Absolute Clarity: Data density without clutter.
Official Authority: Use official government colors (Deep Blue, White, Gold).
Paper Metaphor: UI should feel like a digitized high-quality official register.
Accessibility First: High contrast for government officials on older screens.

scale.caption: text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider
scale.table_header: text-xs font-bold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wider bg-slate-50

primary.description: Maha-Gov Deep Blue - Used for Sidebar, Primary Buttons, Header Accents

secondary.description: Ashoka Gold - Used for borders, active states, subtle highlights

structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full bg-[#003366] text-white z-50
structure.header: h-16 fixed top-0 right-0 left-64 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 z-40 flex items-center px-6 justify-between shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#003366] hover:bg-[#002244] text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.dashboard_stat: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.register_sheet: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-none shadow-none print:border-none

tables.header: bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 font-bold uppercase text-xs border-b border-slate-300

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#003366] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

namuna_8_9.instruction: These are official registers. They MUST be horizontally scrollable if columns exceed width. Use sticky first column for Property ID/Owner Name. Headers must be bilingual (English + Marathi).
namuna_8_9.th_class: border border-slate-400 bg-slate-100 p-2 text-center font-bold

tax_engine.instruction: Use clear input groups for rates. Auto-calculate totals instantly. Show breakdown clearly.

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Inter' for English and 'Noto Sans' for Marathi.
Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA) for all text.
Interactive elements must have a focus ring for accessibility.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds except on the Login page.
All inputs must have clear labels.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a government system. Prioritize correctness, data density, and official aesthetics over 'flashy' animations. The UI should feel solid and permanent. Use the provided color palette strictly. Implement the Sidebar layout defined in 'layout.structure'. For Namuna 8 and 9, create complex tables that mimic the physical paper registers.
